message:
feat(bench): add Criterion benchmarks for WAL engine throughput

Bead: ft-283h4.2

Seven benchmark functions covering in-memory and disk WAL operations:
- append throughput (1K/10K/100K mutations)
- checkpoint cost
- replay performance
- compaction
- disk append with/without fsync
- disk reload
- compact-and-rewrite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -274,6 +274,10 @@ required-features = ["native-wezterm"]
 name = "fork_hardening"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "wal_throughput"
+harness = false
+
 [features]
 # Default-on so workspace builds include FrankenSearch + agent-detection integration.
 # Use `--no-default-features` to compile without these dependencies.
